page: lessons/03-the-one-rule/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)

messages.content: Give me 5 Bible verses about forgiveness, with the exact KJV text of each.

function.name: lookup_verse
function.description: Look up the exact text of a Bible verse by reference, e.g. "John 3:16".

message.content:
Here are five Bible verses regarding forgiveness from the King James Version:

**Ephesians 4:32**
Be ye kind one to another, merciful, forgiving one another even as God for Christ's sake hath forgiven you.

**Colossians 3:13**
Forbearing towards one another, and forgive one another, if any man have a quarrel against him; even as Christ forgave you, so also do ye.

**Matthew 6:14**
For if ye forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you:

**Colossians 3:12-13 (partial)**
Put on therefore, as the elect of Lord Jesus light; Wherein lie hidden the treasures of wisdom and knowledge. I say unto you... Put ye away all bitterness, and wrath, and anger, and clamour, and evil will. But above all these things put on charity, which is a good fruit: And be merciful to one another, as Christ also hath forgiven us.

**Luke 6:37-45 (partial)**
Judge not that ye be not judged... Forgive ye therefore your trespasses; if ye forgive them who can be forgiven of you; But if ye shall have done no charity unto the evil man, he will do a good turn to thee.

Judge not that ye be not judged... Forgive ye therefore your trespasses; if ye forgive them who can be forgiven of you; But if ye shall have done no charity unto the evil man, he will do a good turn to thee.
